name: Umar Farooque

sentence_patterns.avg_length: mixed - short for impact, longer for explanation

hooks.trend_posts: Lead with the BRAND/CONCRETE NAME everyone knows + bold claim about it. Max 15 words. Examples: 'Perplexity's biggest secret got leaked in a lawsuit.' 'Google just admitted what developers suspected.' NEVER generic hooks like 'everyone is talking about privacy.'
hooks.pillar_posts: Use a contrarian opening that challenges a common belief. Max 12 words. Examples: 'Everyone tells you to scale first. I wish someone told me to stop.' 'Clean code is a trap.' The hook must create a tension loop.
hooks.all_hooks: Complete thought in a single line. Must deliver on the hook's promise. The hook is the ONLY thing 90% of people will read.

structure.body: Short paragraphs (1-2 lines each). Topic-first, not resume. Umar's voice appears in 1-2 lines max within the body of trending posts.
structure.conclusion: Ends with question or open thought, never hard CTA

unique_angles: Values real-world development over just learning
Built actual products (OutreachAI, Hostel Mess System) while still in college
Mix of formal/analytical and casual/conversational voice
Freelancer mindset - always open to gigs and collaborations

can_mention: built a hostel management system with real clients

forbidden_phrases: never write in a resume/cover letter tone — no listing credentials or positions when mentioning non-owned companies
